title: 2026-07-15｜Daily English

words.meaning: 兑换；核销；使用优惠券或权益
words.sentence: The checkout flow should confirm coupon redemption before calculating the final price.

words.meaning: 阈值；门槛；触发某项规则的临界值
words.sentence: Free delivery becomes available when the order reaches the minimum threshold.

words.meaning: 分配；配置；将库存、预算或资源分给不同对象
words.sentence: Inventory allocation should happen only after the payment is confirmed.

words.meaning: 回归问题；原本正常的功能因改动再次出现故障
words.sentence: The latest style change introduced a UI regression on smaller screens.

words.meaning: 监听器；用于响应事件的函数或机制
words.sentence: Remember to remove the event listener when the component is unmounted.

words.meaning: 占位符；内容加载或输入前显示的临时提示
words.sentence: Show a loading placeholder while the product data is being fetched.

words.meaning: 假设；在信息尚未完全确认时采用的前提
words.sentence: We should validate the assumption with user data before changing the flow.

words.meaning: 权衡；为了获得某项收益而接受另一项损失
words.sentence: This approach is a trade-off between faster delivery and simpler maintenance.
Online check-in usually opens before the scheduled departure time.

words.meaning: 随身行李；可带入客舱的行李
words.sentence: Check the carry-on allowance before packing for the flight.

focus: 动态复习：attribution / settlement / reimbursement 仍包含较长拼写，今天优先练习 conversion attribution、daily settlement 和 travel reimbursement 三个固定搭配。
业务强化：用 redemption / threshold / allocation 串联优惠核销、规则门槛与库存分配，练习描述完整交易流程。
技术强化：继续复习 serialization / mutation / overflow，并用 regression / listener / placeholder 描述前端改动、事件清理和加载状态。
沟通与旅行：用 assumption / trade-off 说明方案前提与取舍；用 online check-in / carry-on allowance 练习出行前确认信息。
